Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

(Amended) Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF VIP SPORTS MARKETING, INC.'S (AMENDED) MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Grant motion to amend. Motion to continue trial, if sought, must be made in Presiding Judge's department, per SFLR 6.0B. Discovery motions to be made to the Discovery Commissioner (SFLR 10.0A). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/MJM) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Court Reporter: Loretta Najera, CSR #5153

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative Fee) is off calendar and dissolved. Fee was paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)
